description: I officially began my journey in the Web Design Pathway Program at Marlboro High School.
I learned basic HTML and CSS, and made elementary websites on Replit to practice coding in those languages.
I learned Bootstrap and utilized it in organizing content on my website and making it responsive to different screen sizes.
By the end of 11th grade, I learned JavaScript fundamentals via countless tutorials and making mini websites.
I finished learning about JSON files, working with JQuery and then Vue, and how to create & maintain a Gantt chart.
With a partner, I co-created a course planning website for underclassmen at Marlboro High School to utilize for planning out their future courses.
I worked with my first client, my yoga teacher, on making her a website for her yoga studio.
I began working on my senior portfolio, a comprehensive website about me and my journey in the technical field.
I graduate Marlboro High School, continuing my technical journey at Rutgers University.
